title: Random Sizes
description: Every 60s Your Size will randomly change
body:
This Mod Has A Config File!


To start the mod use the command /startresize (Resizzing stops after dying,you will need to renrun the command.)

Every 60 Seconds Your Size will change randomly between 0 and 8x *


This needs to be installed on the server to work.

This uses the /attribute command.


Shouldn't effect promance
